# ZaZet Solutions — zazet-solutions.hr

> Business automation for small businesses (5–50 people). Zagreb, Croatia. HR / EN / HE.

## About
- Company: ZaZet Solutions
- Founder: Gal Tidhar — software consultant (ex-Shopify Staff, Siemens, Novu, Sedric)
- Services: custom web apps, internal tools, booking/payroll/ops systems, integrations
- Audience: SMB operators in Croatia and EU who outgrew spreadsheets
- Engineering portfolio: https://gal.tidhar.org.il/

## Contact
- Email: gal@zazet-solutions.hr
- WhatsApp: +972 50-384-3427 (business line, replies HR/EN same day)
- Free discovery call: Cal.com booking on site

## Links
- Website: https://zazet-solutions.hr/

## Key facts
- Direct work with senior engineer — no agency layers
- Fixed scope and timeline; client owns code and documentation
- Remote-friendly; ~⅓ of clients outside Croatia
